parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO eurostat_regional_gdp (geo_code, geo_name, year, gdp_value, unit)
VALUES ('{{ $json.geo_code }}', '{{ $json.geo_name }}', {{ $json.year }}, {{ $json.gdp_value }}, '{{ $json.unit }}')
ON CONFLICT (geo_code, year, unit)
DO UPDATE SET gdp_value = EXCLUDED.gdp_value, geo_name = EXCLUDED.geo_name;

=INSERT INTO eurostat_regional_crime_rates (geo_code, geo_name, year, offence_category, crime_count, unit)
VALUES ('{{ $json.geo_code }}', '{{ $json.geo_name }}', {{ $json.year }}, '{{ $json.offence_category.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', {{ $json.crime_count }}, '{{ $json.unit }}')
ON CONFLICT (geo_code, year, offence_category, unit)
DO UPDATE SET crime_count = EXCLUDED.crime_count, geo_name = EXCLUDED.geo_name;

=INSERT INTO eurostat_inflation (geo_code, geo_name, time, coicop_code, coicop_name, unit, value)
VALUES ('{{ $json.geo_code }}', '{{ $json.geo_name }}', '{{ $json.time }}', '{{ $json.coicop_code }}', '{{ $json.coicop_name.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.unit }}', {{ $json.value }})
ON CONFLICT (geo_code, time, coicop_code, unit)
DO UPDATE SET value = EXCLUDED.value, geo_name = EXCLUDED.geo_name;

=INSERT INTO eurostat_quarterly_gdp (geo_code, geo_name, time, na_item, unit, s_adj, value)
VALUES ('{{ $json.geo_code }}', '{{ $json.geo_name }}', '{{ $json.time }}', '{{ $json.na_item }}', '{{ $json.unit }}', '{{ $json.s_adj }}', {{ $json.value }})
ON CONFLICT (geo_code, time, na_item, unit, s_adj)
DO UPDATE SET value = EXCLUDED.value, geo_name = EXCLUDED.geo_name;

=INSERT INTO eurostat_unemployment (geo_code, geo_name, time, age, sex, unit, s_adj, value)
VALUES ('{{ $json.geo_code }}', '{{ $json.geo_name }}', '{{ $json.time }}', '{{ $json.age }}', '{{ $json.sex }}', '{{ $json.unit }}', '{{ $json.s_adj }}', {{ $json.value }})
ON CONFLICT (geo_code, time, age, sex, unit, s_adj)
DO UPDATE SET value = EXCLUDED.value, geo_name = EXCLUDED.geo_name;

=INSERT INTO eurostat_house_price_index (geo_code, geo_name, time, purchase, unit, value)
VALUES ('{{ $json.geo_code }}', '{{ $json.geo_name }}', '{{ $json.time }}', '{{ $json.purchase }}', '{{ $json.unit }}', {{ $json.value }})
ON CONFLICT (geo_code, time, purchase, unit)
DO UPDATE SET value = EXCLUDED.value, geo_name = EXCLUDED.geo_name;
